user_profile.name: Priya Sharma
user_profile.stated_goal: Save ₹15 lakh in 2 years for a house down payment in Bangalore

commitments.summary: Priya committed to transferring ₹30,000 to her house fund in November 2025.

acknowledged_patterns.summary: Priya acknowledged she overspends on food delivery — ₹12,890 in October, which she found worse than expected.

details.observation: Spends ~₹12,890/month on food delivery (Swiggy/Zomato), roughly 4x her grocery spend and 10.7% of take-home. User explicitly acknowledged this was worse than she thought.

reminders_set.content: Transfer ₹30,000 to your house fund today — this is your November commitment toward the ₹15 lakh down payment goal.

MacBook decision deadline — colleague selling for ₹80,000. Math: short by ~₹52,000–57,000 this month after all commitments. Revisit: ask colleague to hold until December, or negotiate a token advance now with balance in December.

session_log.summary: 1 new commitment; 1 new pattern; 1 new reminder
